$comment: schema-version: 1.0.0 (versioned as a set with the superspecs package; see schemas/README.md)
title: OpenSpec Proposal AST
description: Parsed AST of an openspec/changes/<id>/proposal.md file. Error code prefix: SDD100-SDD199.

title.description: The top-level # <Title> heading text. Empty → SDD103.

why.description: Body of the ## Why section. Empty/missing → SDD100.

whatChanges.description: Bullets under ## What Changes. Empty → SDD101.

outOfScope.description: Bullets under ## Out of Scope. May be empty.

impact.description: Body of the ## Impact section. Empty/missing → SDD102.
